public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ferry marshal.
appearance: Black leather or dark structured armor, controlled insignia, and enforcement-ready kit make legality feel physically present.
manner: Keeps speech clipped and threshold-focused, reading every arrival for risk, weakness, or breach. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a ferry marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ferry marshal in and around Roaz Northern Trade Route, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Roaz Northern Trade Route while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Petra Lockmere may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Petra Lockmere needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Roaz Northern Trade Route.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Petra Lockmere as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Roaz Northern Trade Route: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

first_impression: Petra Lockmere presents as Keeps speech clipped and threshold-focused, reading every arrival for risk, weakness, or breach. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a ferry marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Ferry Marshal, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Roaz.
what_they_refuse: Petra Lockmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Ferry Marshal too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Petra Lockmere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Petra Lockmere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Petra Lockmere is Known locally through day-to-day work as ferry marshal. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Ferry Marshal.
social_texture: Petra Lockmere speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Roaz Northern Trade Route, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Petra touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Petra Lockmere when the party needs a socially grounded face for Roaz Northern Trade Route: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
